name: payments_v1
description: Payment gateway with merchants, settlements, and disputes
create_sql:
-- Schema: payments_v1 (Payment gateway with merchants, settlements, and disputes)

CREATE TABLE merchants (
  merchant_id INT PK,
  business_name VARCHAR,
  category VARCHAR,
  mcc_code VARCHAR,
  onboarded_date DATE,
  risk_level VARCHAR,
  active BOOL
);

CREATE TABLE payment_links (
  link_id INT PK,
  merchant_id INT FK(merchants),
  amount DECIMAL(12,2),
  currency VARCHAR,
  created_at TIMESTAMP,
  expires_at TIMESTAMP,
  status VARCHAR
);

CREATE TABLE payments (
  payment_id INT PK,
  link_id INT FK(payment_links),
  payer_email VARCHAR,
  amount DECIMAL(12,2),
  payment_method VARCHAR,
  status VARCHAR,
  gateway_txn_id VARCHAR,
  paid_at TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE settlements (
  settlement_id INT PK,
  merchant_id INT FK(merchants),
  settlement_date DATE,
  gross_amount DECIMAL(12,2),
  fees DECIMAL(10,2),
  net_amount DECIMAL(12,2),
  status VARCHAR,
  utr_number VARCHAR
);

CREATE TABLE disputes (
  dispute_id INT PK,
  payment_id INT FK(payments),
  raised_by VARCHAR,
  reason VARCHAR,
  amount DECIMAL(12,2),
  status VARCHAR,
  raised_at TIMESTAMP,
  resolved_at TIMESTAMP
);
